title: OpenAI Fully Opens ChatGPT Health Feature: Integrated with Apple Health and Electronic Medical Records, 300 Million Users Consult Health Issues Weekly
excerpt: OpenAI has officially removed the waitlist for the ChatGPT Health feature and made it available to all users in the U.S. aged 18 and above. Users of all plans,
content_html:
OpenAI has officially removed the waitlist for the ChatGPT Health feature and made it available to all users in the U.S. aged 18 and above. Users of all plans, including the free version, Go, Plus, and Pro, can now directly access the health experience on the web and iOS versions of ChatGPT's sidebar.

According to OpenAI statistics, the number of users consulting health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has increased from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million per week.

Integrating Apple Health and Electronic Medical Records, AI Fully Understands Your Body

After several months of testing and feedback, ChatGPT Health has achieved multiple upgrades. The system can now integrate with Apple Health and electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several U.S. hospital systems. After user authorization, ChatGPT can comprehensively analyze data such as medication use, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to provide personalized health answers.

For example, users can ask ChatGPT to compare the latest lab results with previous data, summarize health changes since the last visit, or assess the impact of sleep and exercise on daily conditions.

Users not only can ask questions in the health section but also can introduce a health context explicitly by typing "@Health" in regular conversations, or authorize ChatGPT to automatically refer to health background when answering questions—for instance, considering dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities.

The system will always seek user permission before accessing health data, allowing users to choose single-time authorization or permanent permission. Regarding privacy issues, OpenAI clearly states that all accessed medical records, Apple Health data, and related conversation content will not be used for training large language models or for advertising purposes.

sentences.zh: OpenAI 已正式取消 ChatGPT Health 功能的等待名单，并将其提供给美国所有 18 岁及以上的用户。

sentences.zh: 所有计划（包括免费版、Go、Plus 和 Pro）的用户现在都可以直接在 ChatGPT 侧边栏的网页版和 iOS 版上访问健康体验。

blocks.html_en: According to OpenAI statistics, the number of users consulting health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has increased from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million per week.

sentences.en: According to OpenAI statistics, the number of users consulting health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has increased from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million per week.
sentences.zh: 据OpenAI统计，ChatGPT上咨询健康养生相关问题的用户数量已从早期的2.3亿增加到每周超过3亿。

blocks.html_en: Integrating Apple Health and Electronic Medical Records, AI Fully Understands Your Body

sentences.en: Integrating Apple Health and Electronic Medical Records, AI Fully Understands Your Body
sentences.zh: 整合苹果健康与电子病历，AI全面了解你的身体

blocks.html_en: After several months of testing and feedback, ChatGPT Health has achieved multiple upgrades. The system can now integrate with Apple Health and electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several U.S. hospital systems. After user authorization, ChatGPT can comprehensively analyze data such as medication use, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to provide personalized health answers.

sentences.en: After several months of testing and feedback, ChatGPT Health has achieved multiple upgrades.
sentences.zh: 经过几个月的测试和反馈，ChatGPT Health 实现了多项升级。

sentences.en: The system can now integrate with Apple Health and electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several U.S. hospital systems.
sentences.zh: 该系统现在可以与 Apple Health 以及 One Medical、Function Health 和多家美国医院系统的电子病历集成。

sentences.en: After user authorization, ChatGPT can comprehensively analyze data such as medication use, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to provide personalized health answers.
sentences.zh: 经过用户授权后，ChatGPT可以综合分析用药情况、化验结果、病历、睡眠、日常运动等数据，提供个性化的健康解答。

blocks.html_en: For example, users can ask ChatGPT to compare the latest lab results with previous data, summarize health changes since the last visit, or assess the impact of sleep and exercise on daily conditions.

sentences.en: For example, users can ask ChatGPT to compare the latest lab results with previous data, summarize health changes since the last visit, or assess the impact of sleep and exercise on daily conditions.
sentences.zh: 例如，用户可以要求 ChatGPT 将最新的实验室结果与之前的数据进行比较，总结自上次访问以来的健康变化，或评估睡眠和运动对日常状况的影响。

blocks.html_en: Users not only can ask questions in the health section but also can introduce a health context explicitly by typing "@Health" in regular conversations, or authorize ChatGPT to automatically refer to health background when answering questions—for instance, considering dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities.

sentences.en: Users not only can ask questions in the health section but also can introduce a health context explicitly by typing "@Health" in regular conversations, or authorize ChatGPT to automatically refer to health background when answering questions—for instance, considering dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities.
sentences.zh: 用户不仅可以在健康部分提出问题，还可以在日常对话中输入“@Health”来明确介绍健康背景，或者授权ChatGPT在回答问题时自动参考健康背景——例如，在推荐膳食时考虑饮食限制，或者在计划体育活动时避开近期受伤的部位。

blocks.html_en: The system will always seek user permission before accessing health data, allowing users to choose single-time authorization or permanent permission. Regarding privacy issues, OpenAI clearly states that all accessed medical records, Apple Health data, and related conversation content will not be used for training large language models or for advertising purposes.

sentences.en: The system will always seek user permission before accessing health data, allowing users to choose single-time authorization or permanent permission.
sentences.zh: 系统在访问健康数据之前总是会征求用户的许可，允许用户选择一次性授权或永久许可。

sentences.en: Regarding privacy issues, OpenAI clearly states that all accessed medical records, Apple Health data, and related conversation content will not be used for training large language models or for advertising purposes.
sentences.zh: 关于隐私问题，O​​penAI 明确表示，所有访问的医疗记录、Apple Health 数据以及相关对话内容都不会用于训练大型语言模型或用于广告目的。

content_html_zh:
OpenAI 已正式取消 ChatGPT Health 功能的等待名单，并将其提供给美国所有 18 岁及以上的用户。 所有计划（包括免费版、Go、Plus 和 Pro）的用户现在都可以直接在 ChatGPT 侧边栏的网页版和 iOS 版上访问健康体验。

据OpenAI统计，ChatGPT上咨询健康养生相关问题的用户数量已从早期的2.3亿增加到每周超过3亿。

整合苹果健康与电子病历，AI全面了解你的身体

经过几个月的测试和反馈，ChatGPT Health 实现了多项升级。 该系统现在可以与 Apple Health 以及 One Medical、Function Health 和多家美国医院系统的电子病历集成。 经过用户授权后，ChatGPT可以综合分析用药情况、化验结果、病历、睡眠、日常运动等数据，提供个性化的健康解答。

例如，用户可以要求 ChatGPT 将最新的实验室结果与之前的数据进行比较，总结自上次访问以来的健康变化，或评估睡眠和运动对日常状况的影响。

用户不仅可以在健康部分提出问题，还可以在日常对话中输入“@Health”来明确介绍健康背景，或者授权ChatGPT在回答问题时自动参考健康背景——例如，在推荐膳食时考虑饮食限制，或者在计划体育活动时避开近期受伤的部位。

系统在访问健康数据之前总是会征求用户的许可，允许用户选择一次性授权或永久许可。 关于隐私问题，O​​penAI 明确表示，所有访问的医疗记录、Apple Health 数据以及相关对话内容都不会用于训练大型语言模型或用于广告目的。
